name: Privacy analytics
description: Plausible or Matomo analytics snippet in the page head — no Google Analytics in core.

settings_schema.label: Site domain
settings_schema.description: Plausible: value for data-domain (e.g. latch.network). Ignored for Matomo.

settings_schema.label: Plausible script host
settings_schema.description: Hostname only — plausible.io or your self-hosted Plausible.

settings_schema.label: Matomo base URL
settings_schema.description: HTTPS tracker root, e.g. https://analytics.example.com/ (trailing slash optional).

settings_schema.label: Matomo site ID
settings_schema.description: Numeric site id from your Matomo property.

settings_schema.label: Guests only
settings_schema.description: Skip the snippet for signed-in members (recommended for privacy).
